feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: /SCWM/REPL fails when creating HU WT but /SCWM/ADHU is ok
entry.content:
Dear SAP gurus:

We are having a struggle with our implementation of EWM. Let me explain the case.

We have a warehouse that's physically divided in 2 areas:

1: Full pallet area: These are a Bulk storage types, each HU has 1 material /1 batch but in the bin there can be mixed batches for the same material.

2: Pick-hu area: this is a rack storage that works with fixed bin and is replenished when the quantity goes below some stock.

In order to move the HUs from Full Pallet area to Pick-HU area, we also use LOSC as the forklifts from Full pallet area do not fit into pick-hu area and therefore they leave the HU in an intermediate Storage type.

We have set the storage type as planned replenishment, we have set the masterdata (material and packspec for warehouse process).

Stock is aligned, no inconsistencies. There is available stock to move.

If we run the REPL transaction, selecting Warehouse number and Show log settings

the system gives an error /SCWM/L3686 

Available quantity is not sufficient for HU WT

If we take one HU and move it to pick-HU area with ADHU, it works.

Note: Both WTs are now cancelled but were created following LOSC, one of them was inactive until the other was confirmed.

Have you ever had this issue? Any help would be much appreciated.

Regards

Iris

entry.title: KIT to stock process- batch determination of components at production order release
entry.content:
In the KIT to stock process, we have our batch determination of components during the release of production order, these batches are copied over to the outbound delivery and later gets distributed to EWM. 

In scenarios where the determined batch cannot be picked (could be missing material, incomplete qty, damages etc.), and a new batch needs to be picked during the OBD processing in EWM and be picked up by the WT. Is there a possibility with exception handling to handle such cases or what could be a possible solution in such cases ?

 

Thanks,

Sandeep

entry.title: Qrfc multiple entries in a single queue
entry.content:
Is it possible to add delay between execution of multiple LUW entries with a single Qrfc?

I have enabled Mass Queue for Inbound Delivery Distribution(VL06I) from ERP to EWM. Now, if I distribute 12 deliveries, i will have 12 LUW entries in my QRFC. I want to add a delay in between LUW execution. Is it possible? Let me know.

entry.title: Honeywell and S4/Hana integration
entry.content:
Hi Everyone. 

We are currently working on a project which integrates honeywell wms to SAP S4Hana , upon receiving of PO in WMS and transporting the payload to SAP, we received an error "gr exceeded" even if the open PO has the same quantity with GR quantity. Tolerance level is not acceptable since the GR and PO are exactly the same. 

has anyone experienced this? 

Thank you.

entry.title: how to customize batch quantities on handling units in RF environment
entry.content:
Hello experts

unfortunately I have problems with mix HU in inbound processes. I would like to post goods receipt of batch managed material with different batch numbers all on one HU. 

How do I customize that there could be different batch numbers within one HU.

Thank you in advance!!

entry.title: Received stock does not have inspection ID in ARM
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm running ARM process in the test system. I've created a return order and followed the return delivery.

After the stock of returned delivery has been GR and putaway to the clarification zone, I found there is no inspection ID for the stock. I'm wonder if there is something needs to be configured, thanks a lot.

Here is a help doc: Returns Logistics and Returns Stock | SAP Help Portal

But I think it's not so detail about quality management settings.

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: Combine Multiple Freight orders, which belong to one Carrier, into one Transportation unit in SAP EW
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I am looking for a solution where  I can combine multiple freight orders, which belong to one carrier,  into one Transportation unit in EWM.

Kindly note that this is kind of a parcel scenario and due to multiple constraints, it is not possible to create one Freight order for one carrier.

Please suggest possible solution options.

Thanks in Advance!

Regards

Gaurav

entry.title: where i can find Kit header item after kit creation at work center in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi All,

In kitting process we have created the kit at work center for HU with components, where this information is getting stored.

We can see the Kit header item in Pack work center with Kit icon (ICON_VSI). However, in which table kit information is getting stored.

entry.title: EWM Putaway Storage Section Indicator Defaulting to Incorrect Putaway Bin
entry.content: Product does not have a Fixed Bin assigned and the Putaway Storage Section Indicator is set to HTZN in EWM Product Master Data, then the assumption is the automatic warehouse task Storage Bin for Putaway should go to a Bin with the Storage Section HTZN, it does not.

entry.title: Unpack option, or unpack everything in the APP "pack outbound deliveries"
entry.content:
Hello experts.

It is not possible to use the unpack option, or unpack everything in the APP "pack outbound deliveries" app, when the work center warehouse type has mandatory HU control.

This error happens

What should I configure to be able to use HU in the work center, as this is a customer requirement?

entry.title: /scwm/adgi - Post GI - API or FM
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In SAP EWM 2022 (on-premise system), I'm developing an custom Unmanaged RAP API to automate unplanned goods issue (GI) posting. Currently, manual posting involves entering the following details:

Tcode: /n/scwm/adgi

Selection screen values:

1) Warehouse Number

2) Product

3) Storage Bin

4) GI Process: Consumption

5) unchecked checkbox: Select Scrap Stock only

Execute and Select Physical stock and pressed Post GI. 

Messages appears: Warehouse task created. 

On Refreshing, entry Disappears. 

Question:

While creating Post GI, tried checking following FM Calls. None of these FM's got triggered. 

/SCWM/STOCK_CHANGE
/SCWM/GM_POST
/SCWM/TO_CREATE

Please help with FM or standard API which will help in automating Post GI Process in SAP EWM 2022 onprem. 

Note: 

I have already checked following standard documentation.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/d6f87c227f894ba1b2c0d697189b73c4.html

https://api.sap.com/api/OP_WHSEPHYSICALSTOCKPRODUCTS_0001/overview?ReleaseInfo=2022%20FPS02

 

Regards,

Nikhil1

entry.title: Storage bin w36 / does not exist. (message no PK033)
entry.content:
Hi Guru's,

first time i am creating kanban for semifinished in-house produced material. 
after creating production supply area through PK05. When i try to create control cycle through PK01 at that time i am facing above error (Storage bin w36 / does not exist). please help me to resolve this issue.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: I want to edit transportation data of BP or role carrier in SAP EWM system . Can anyone tell me how
entry.content: I want to edit transportation data of BP or role carrier in SAP EWM system . Can anyone tell me how to do that. I tried to search BADI and Exit but didn't found that

entry.title: Control cycle for EWM IM managed slocs
entry.content:
Hi All,

we are using S4 HANA Embedded 2023,I am staging for PSA source location is EWM managed and destination PSA is IM managed what are the settings I need to do for control cycle and what is a staging indicator.

Request  to share the end to end process.

Kindly share any blogs if you have any, appreciate your help.

Regards,

Chand

entry.title: Product is under 910 status
entry.content: The product ARLAIDTE CY 5995 is deleted, but due to missing one step at the last delivery, the warehouse still showing the product is under 910 status. Since this product is globally deleted, and cannot be reactive. Please provide solution to clear the dummy data in SAP.

entry.title: CDS View Table functions Abap Class consume with parameters
entry.content:
Hello please can someone assist me. I want to select data through a class method implemented in ABAP class. This method takes parameters from the defined table function to filter on POnumber and POitem. Goal is to call this table function in my main CDS View, but i have already something in the from clause and several joins. So i can only join the table function i guess.

This works but only with static parametric-al data but i want to have it dynamic.

hard-coded:

left outer join Z_WH_EDDATE_TABLE_FUNCTION(clnt: $session.client, ebeln_param: '4500000020', ebelp_param: '00010') on ekpo.ebeln = Z_WH_EDDATE_TABLE_FUNCTION.ebeln_1

Goal:

left outer join Z_WH_EDDATE_TABLE_FUNCTION(clnt: $session.client, ebeln_param: ekko.ebeln, ebelp_param: '00010') on ekpo.ebeln = Z_WH_EDDATE_TABLE_FUNCTION.ebeln_1

Error: Unexpected word "ekko"

Next try, execute directly in the fields block:

Z_WH_EDDATE_TABLE_FUNCTION(clnt: $session.client, ebeln_param: '4500000123', ebelp_param: '00010').ed_date as exc,

Error: It is not possible to expand path element Z_WH_EDDATE_TABLE_FUNCTION

I want to select data through a class method implemented in ABAP class. This method takes parameters from the defined table function to filter on POnumber and POitem. Goal is to call this table function in my main CDS View, but i have already something in the from clause and several joins. So i can only join the table function i guess.

This works but only with static parametric-al data but i want to have it dynamic.

hard-coded:

left outer join Z_WH_EDDATE_TABLE_FUNCTION(clnt: $session.client, ebeln_param: '4500000020', ebelp_param: '00010') on ekpo.ebeln = Z_WH_EDDATE_TABLE_FUNCTION.ebeln_1

Goal:

left outer join Z_WH_EDDATE_TABLE_FUNCTION(clnt: $session.client, ebeln_param: ekko.ebeln, ebelp_param: '00010') on ekpo.ebeln = Z_WH_EDDATE_TABLE_FUNCTION.ebeln_1

Error: Unexpected word "ekko"

Next try, execute directly in the fields block:

Z_WH_EDDATE_TABLE_FUNCTION(clnt: $session.client, ebeln_param: '4500000123', ebelp_param: '00010').ed_date as exc,

Error: It is not possible to expand path element Z_WH_EDDATE_TABLE_FUNCTION

So i guess it is not possible have a dynamic calling of table functions with parameters from an CDS view. How would you handle this?

Table function:

> define table function Z_WH_EDDATE_TABLE_FUNCTION with parameters
>     @Environment.systemField: #CLIENT
>     clnt   :abap.clnt,
>     ebeln_param :abap.char( 10 ),
>     ebelp_param :abap.numc( 5 ) 
> returns {   client : abap.clnt;   ebeln_1 : abap.char( 10 );   ed_date : abap.dats( 8 ); } implemented
> by method ZCL_FLIGHTS_DEMO_CDS=>ED_DATE_RETRIEVAL;

ABAP method:

> METHOD ED_DATE_RETRIEVAL
>         BY DATABASE FUNCTION
>         FOR HDB
>         LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
>         OPTIONS READ-ONLY
>         USING ekes.
> 
>             itab_ed =
>                 SELECT
>                     ekes.mandt as client,
>                     ekes.ebeln as ebeln_1,
>                     ekes.eindt as expDate
>                 FROM ekes
>                  WHERE  ekes.ebtyp = 'ED'
>                  and ekes.ebeln = :ebeln_param and ekes.ebelp = :ebelp_param;
>            RETURN
>                 SELECT client,
>                         ebeln_1,
>                         MIN(expDate) as ed_date
>                  FROM :itab_ed
>                  GROUP BY client,ebeln_1;
>     ENDMETHOD.

The problem is only calling ekes without where conditions leads to out of memory allocation sometimes.
For me it is curious why we cant give dynmaic parameters but hard coded ones to the calling of a view.

entry.title: Random product selection in SAP EWM Cycle Counting?
entry.content: If we are using EWM Cycle Counting and let's say our interval is 180 days for indicator "A". After the 180 days is up and cycle counting starts over, does the system pick the same products in exact same order for new count? Or is there a way to force system to pick products assigned to "A" randomly, which is what the business desires.

entry.title: A question about SMQ2 Logical Unit Of Work size limitations
entry.content: Our customer had a situation where they tried to push 77k transactions in one logical unit of work and the transactions went into SYSFAIL status with a time out situation after processing for a long time.  They had to chunk it up into smaller LUW's to get it to work and they asked what is the size limitation on LUW's.  I can't find any documentation on that, and wondered if the hive mind had a number or a solution.  Would it be to just keep expanding the timeout parameter?

entry.title: SAP EWM Addition to stock putaway strategy
entry.content:
I have specific requirement from client that while doing the put-away of product "A", system should search the bins where the same product "A" exists and suggest the same bin according to remaining capacity in that bin. For the remaining stock of the product "A", system shouldn't search empty bin but rather do the put-away in any bin if capacity allows. 

In current system, all bins are with mixed product.

To map this requirement, I have configured put-away rule as Addition to stock/empty bins and also allowed mixed storage without any limitation. Everything works fine with this set-up, but client wants not to look for empty bin and wants the system to suggest other bin which is partially occupied and having the enough capacity. Please advise if this is possible to achieve with any BADI or any other configuration is required?

Thanks

entry.title: HU information not getting updated in SAP TM for Inbound delivery scenario
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on a S4 Side car TM/EWM implementation, where we have inbound delivery based TM integration and TM-EWM integration is based on TU.

I am trying to get the HU/ Pallets in SAP TM from EWM. But system is not updating Freight unit or Freight order with Pallet/HU information. Where as the Charge calculation is based on Pallet quantity.

As per SAP, system allow HU update only via LDAP, if LDAP is applicable.
But if I follow Arrival at check point> Unload start> GR >>> HU gets updated in S4 from EWM and then S4 tries to update TM with HU.

If inbound scenario with HU is possible then kindly share the steps. 

Looking for your support.

Regards,

Krishnendu
